Commands for managing CircleCI project environment variables.

Environment variable values are never returned by the API — only
names are readable. Use 'set' to create or update a variable.

Usage:
  project env [command]

Available Commands:
  delete      Delete a project environment variable
  get         Get a project environment variable (name only; value is redacted)
  list        List project environment variables
  set         Set a project environment variable

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for env

Use "project env [command] --help" for more information about a command.
